caption: This video sequence features a news broadcast focused on politics in Bihar. The frames display a split-screen layout with various portraits of political figures, including Nitish Kumar and others, along with an outline map of Bihar. In the first two frames, the map is overlaid with a graphic of a lightning strike, and the red ticker at the bottom reads, "PM: NDA सरकार बिहार के विकास में कसर नहीं छोड़ेंगी". The top header in the first frame states, "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". As the sequence progresses, the visuals shift to show figures in white traditional Indian attire standing in a formal setting. A large red banner appears over the map stating "सुशासन पर चैलेंज". The text "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" is visible on the left, and names like "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी" appear on the right side of the screen. The time stamp "10:04 PM" remains consistent across all frames.
